body.title: Review CSB/DSB format — D330 data shows prose wins
body.result: Review complete. CSB has 3 distinct roles: (1) content_csb DB column — leave name, render to prose for LLM; (2) preparse output — already prose-like, leave as-is; (3) .csb.txt archives — human storage, not LLM input. DSB: pipe-delimited storage stays, but context-load now renders to prose via sed. TWM content_csb will render to prose when D330 TWM-view is implemented.
body.description: D330 context format test shows CSB pipe-delimited format costs +7% tokens vs prose AND produces lower quality responses. Questions: (1) Should we remove or limit CSB as LLM context format? (2) Does the same apply to DSB (design doc format)? CSB/DSB may still have value for human-readable structured storage and grep-ability, but for LLM ingestion prose is better. Evaluate both formats for all their use cases. — deferred: scope/priority TBD
